mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, agent_name, user_message, agent_reply, trace_snapshot, total_duration_ms, tokens_prompt, tokens_completion, model_name, status, error_message, created_by, created_at FROM ai_agent_test_session WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, agent_id, agent_name, user_message, history_messages, agent_reply, trace_snapshot, total_duration_ms, tokens_prompt, tokens_completion, model_name, status, error_message, created_by, created_at FROM ai_agent_test_session WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_test_session (agent_id, agent_name, user_message, history_messages, agent_reply, trace_snapshot, total_duration_ms, tokens_prompt, tokens_completion, model_name, status, error_message, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{agentName}, #{userMessage}, #{historyMessages}, #{agentReply}, #{traceSnapshot}, #{totalDurationMs}, #{tokensPrompt}, #{tokensCompletion}, #{modelName}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
